personalInfo.summary:
Full-Stack GenAI Engineer with experience designing and delivering real-time, production-grade AI systems across enterprise client engagements at Deloitte USI. Proven track record of building agentic GenAI solutions, scalable backend services, and cloud-native deployments, with ownership across frontend, backend, DevOps, and Azure OpenAI infrastructure. Led rapid prototyping efforts in lean teams to deliver client-ready GenAI POCs within weeks, including real-time
call center agents and tool-augmented AI systems integrated with
enterprise platforms such as EPIC.

description: Realtime GenAI Call Center POC — Exact Sciences (Client Engagement) | Jul 2025 – Present
Built a real-time AI call center agent using GPT Realtime and the OpenAI Agents SDK, enabling low-latency voice and SMS interactions.
Integrated Azure Communication Services (ACS) and Five9 for real-time telephony and agent orchestration.
Developed tool-augmented GenAI agents, integrating enterprise APIs including EPIC to extend agent functionality.
Designed an SMS context persistence solution using Braze, ensuring reliable conversation continuity across sessions.
Owned end-to-end deployment and DevOps, provisioning Azure infrastructure and deploying GPT models via Azure OpenAI.
Contributed across frontend, backend, and agentic GenAI development in a lean 4-member team.
Deloitte Internal GenAI Initiatives | Nov 2024 – Jun 2025
Delivered client-ready agentic GenAI POCs for LSHC use cases using rapid AI-assisted development workflows.
Shipped production-quality prototypes within ~2 weeks, accelerating GenAI adoption for internal and client stakeholders.
Mentored new team members and contributed to architectural and integration decisions.
Predictive Insight Center — Takeda (Client Engagement) | Mar 2024 – Nov 2024
Led backend architecture for a unified manufacturing application supporting medicine and plasma production workflows.
Built scalable services using FastAPI and PostgreSQL, aligned with enterprise performance and compliance requirements.
Modernized a legacy system by migrating from Plotly–Redis to a FastAPI–Angular–Celery architecture, leveraging AWS SQS for scalability.
Served as backend MVP, owning performance, integration, and delivery in collaboration with cross-functional teams.
Development in frappe framework.
